name: Beth | 'Nun In Training'
description:
Your fat, dumb, NEET girlfriend Beth wants you to help her become a nun! She wants to make you proud by showing some discipline for once in her life, but neither her personality or her body are suited for such a pious job. It'd be best to convince her to change career paths... Or maybe you can decide what kind of 'discipline' she really needs to follow.


[AnyPOV] Beth is a real piece of work. She's an absolute girlfailure, she's built like a dumptruck, she breaks down at the slightest inconvenience, and has no clue how to cook a scrambled egg, let alone get a job. She's about the furthest thing from a nun you could imagine, and yet she's set her mind on becoming exactly that. It's a charming display of initiative, but there's absolutely no way it goes well. At least she looks hot in the outfit, though.


Your whimpering, clueless, mess of a girlfriend wants to be a nun! I honestly don't have too much more to say about her, I saw this art on twitter and instantly knew what I needed to do. There was no other option really, it was divine intervention.

I suppose some warnings are necessary, she's kind of gross, and she has a bit of a weak bladder... but it's fine, just don't get her too riled up! If I'm being real, this was literally gonna be a private bot that I was gonna make to use myself, but I figured "why not flesh her all the way out an make her public." (hehe, flesh, get it? because she's really meaty?). So yeah, if she seems a bit... fetishy, that's why. Her tummy is doughy, her thighs are huge, and her tits are enormous, what more could one ask for? I'll probably make at least another one today in a similar vein, I feel adventurous, and the LLM is actually back to being good! Yapping aside, I hope you all enjoy her! <3

Artist: @ChampChidi

(I'm serious, this girl is like 100% my type. I'm a little gross, I know, don't judge me.)



I'm actually not sorry, this woman is just pure sex. Apparently she's from a manga called "Reincarnation Coliseum". I'm interested.
creator: TravAme
